raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Jewtus fazzija us teem
Wezzajeem no Gileadas: Neggi
juhs mann eſtat eenihdejscht / un
mann no manna Tehwa Namma
iſdſinnnscht? kapehz tad eſtat juhs
pee man nahkuschi / kad jums
Behdas irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Wezzajee no Gilea-
das fazzija us Jewtu: tapehz ef-
fam mehſ nu pee tew atgreeſu-
ſchees/ ka tew buhs ar mumseet/
un prett Ammona Behrneem kar-
zoht/un tew buhs mumis par Gal-
wu buht/pahr wiſteem/kaß eekſch
Gileandas dsihtwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jewtus us teem
Wezzajeem no Gileadas: Kad juhs
mann atpakkat weddat prett Am-
mona Behrneem karzoht / un tas
KUNGS tohs manna Preeſcha
nodohs / buhs tad man jums par
Galwu buht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tee Wezzajee
no Gileadas us Jewtu : lai tas
KUNGS muhſu Starpâ dsird/
ja mehſ ta ne darriſtim / ka mehſ
tew effam runnajscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje Jewtus ar teem
Wezzajeem no Gileadas / un tee
Laudis eezehele wiꞥſchu par Gal-
wa / un par Katta-Wirfneeku/un
Jewtus runnaja wiſſis fauns
Wahrdus preetſch ta KUNGÂ
eekſch Mizpas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jewtus fuhttija Weh-
ſtus us Ammona Behrenu Rehni-
ra/ un fazzija : Kaſtew ar man-
nim jadarra / ka tu eſti pee man
nahzis prett mannu Semmi kar-
zoht ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ammona BehrnuReh-
nisch fazzija us Jewtus Weh-
ſtus: tapehz ka Israëls irr wan-
nu Semmi nehmis / kad wiꞥſc-
no Egiptes iſgahje / no Arnons
lihds Jabokam/un lihdſtat Jarda-
nai / tad nu atdoht man to a-
labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Jewtus fuhttija atka-
Wehſtus us Ammona Behrnu
Rehnira/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fazzija us to: ta ſak-
ka Jewtus : Israëls ne irr to Mo-
abiteru Semmi / nedß Ammona
Behruu Semmi nehmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo kad wiꞥſch no Egipte-
iſgahje/ tad gabje Israëls zaar t-
Tukfneti lihdſtat Nedru-Juhrai-
un nahze us Rahdefu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Israëls fuhttija Weh-
ſtus us to Rehnira no Eedoina
un fazzija: lat es jelle zaar taw-
Semmi ermu/ bet to Eedomiteru
Rehniraſch ne klauttija/ un wiꞥſc-
fuh-tja arridsan us to Moabiteru
Rehnira/ tas arri ne gribbeja/to-
palikke Israels eekſch Rahdes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to statgaja wiꞥſc-
Tukfneti/ un appahje apkabrt t-
Eedomiteru Semmi/ un to Mo-
abiteru Semmi/ un nahze us t-
Moabiteru Semmi/ un tee ap-
mettehs wiꞥſchus Arnona / be-
tee ne nahze eekſch to Moabiteru
Rohbeschae/jo Arnons irr to Mo-
abiteru Rohbeschae.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Israels fuhttija Weh-
ſtus us Stonu to Amoriteru Reh-
nira/ to Rehnira no Esbona/ un
Israels fazzija us wiꞥſchu: lai je-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
